dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7065 IH: Seneca Nation Law Enforcement Efficiency Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Langworthy introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources

form.official-title: To nullify the applicability of the Act of July 2, 1948, with respect to the reservations of the Seneca Nation of Indians in New York.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Seneca Nation Law Enforcement Efficiency Act.

Subject to written concurrence of the Attorney General of the United States and the Seneca Nation of Indians, the jurisdiction granted to the State of New York by the Act of July 2, 1948 (62 Stat. 1224, ch. 809; 25 U.S.C. 232) shall not apply with respect to the reservations of the Seneca Nation of Indians.
